backend/main.mo: Main actor defining comprehensive trip booking system with user profiles (customer/driver/admin roles), trip management with detailed fields (tripType, journeyType, vehicleType, duration, locations with pincode/area/coordinates, phone, landmark), authorization mixin, and CRUD operations for trips and profiles.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old trip data structure (simple pickup/dropoff text fields) to new comprehensive Trip type with tripType, journeyType, vehicleType, duration, Location objects, phone, and landmark fields, applying default values for legacy data.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implementation of trip booking form enhancements including trip type (local/outstation), journey type (one-way/round-trip) with info modals, vehicle type dropdown, smart hire duration (hours for local, days for outstation), location fields with GPS support, and fare calculation.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components including role-based routing, comprehensive RideRequestForm with trip/journey/vehicle type selection, smart duration handling, location mode toggle with GPS, formatted location displays (area, pincode), and earth-tone themed UI components.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind layers defining OKLCH color system using neutral grayscale tones for light/dark modes, custom radius, and CSS variables for consistent theming across components including sidebar, charts, and form elements.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with viewport meta tag, title 'Namma Driver Pilot', root div mount point, and module script loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application router setup with TanStack Router defining root layout, landing page, role selection, and strict role-based dashboard routes (customer/driver/admin) with authentication guards that redirect users to correct dashboards before rendering, plus ProfileSetupModal trigger logic.
frontend/src/components/AdminTripsTab.ts: Admin dashboard tab that displays all trips in a searchable table with customer/driver info, locations, status badges, and timestamps. Uses useGetAllTrips and useGetAllUsers hooks to fetch and correlate trip and user data.
frontend/src/components/AdminUsersTab.ts: Admin dashboard tab that displays all users in a searchable table showing email, full name, role badges with lock indicators, and join dates. Uses useGetAllUsers hook to fetch user data.
frontend/src/components/AvailableTripsSe: Driver-facing component that displays requested trips with pickup/dropoff locations and an accept button for each trip. Uses useGetRequestedTrips and useAcceptTrip hooks.
frontend/src/components/CustomerTripList: Customer-facing component that displays the user's trip history with pickup/dropoff locations, status badges, and timestamps. Uses useGetMyTrips hook to fetch customer's trips.
frontend/src/components/DriverTripList.t: Driver-facing component that displays accepted trips with a 'Mark as Completed' button for trips in accepted status. Uses useGetMyTrips and useCompleteTrip hooks.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper component that includes Navigation header, main content area, and footer with caffeine.ai attribution. Provides consistent page structure across the app.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Top navigation bar with app branding, user dropdown menu showing profile info and role, dashboard navigation, and logout functionality. Uses Internet Identity authentication and user profile hooks.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal component for initial user profile setup that collects email and full name, creates a UserProfile with null role, and saves it via useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
Comprehensive ride request form component handling local/outstation trips, journey types, vehicle selection, duration/date-time inputs, manual/GPS location entry, and contact details, submitting via useCreateTrip mutation.
frontend/src/components/RoleSelectionWar: Modal with 60-second countdown that forces users to choose between Customer or Driver role permanently via useUpdateUserRoleAndLock mutation, then redirects to appropriate dashboard.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with Internet Identity authentication, initializes access control with admin token, and invalidates dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: React Query hook that fetches the current authenticated user's profile from the backend actor, enabled only when actor is available.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout flows, identity state, and login status tracking with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for all backend operations including user profile management, role updates, trip creation/retrieval, and trip acceptance/completion with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining light and dark theme color palettes using earth tones and warm greens for the application's design system.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient, InternetIdentityProvider, and renders the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page with tabs for managing users and trips, displaying counts and using AdminUsersTab and AdminTripsTab components.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerDashboard.tsx: Customer dashboard page with a two-column layout showing a ride request form and a list of the customer's trips.
frontend/src/pages/DriverDashboard.tsx: Driver dashboard page with tabs for viewing available trips to accept and managing accepted trips.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Landing page with hero section and features, handles login and redirects authenticated users to appropriate dashboards based on their role.
frontend/src/pages/RoleSelectionPage.tsx: Role selection page that displays customer and driver options, shows a warning modal, and redirects users who already have roles assigned.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from query strings or hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence and cleanup capabilities.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH, extended theme settings, animations, and plugins for typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Project state file for 'Namma Driver Pilot' ride-booking MVP with React/Vite frontend and Supabase backend, tracking architectural decisions, existing features (auth, dashboards, role-based access), and implementation status. Includes schema for profiles, user_roles, and trips tables with RLS policies and role selection flow with 60-second countdown timer.
